text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)
uname -a:
FreeBSD oooneabox 13.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE releng/13.1-n250148-fc952ac2212 GENERIC amd64

pkg info drm-kmod:
Name drm-kmod
Version 20220501

There is no crash message, simply the boot stops at "Loading kernel modules:". It stays like that, after a minute it reboots.
